description_long: This object consists of a series of tall, rectangular stools or platforms arranged in a linear and parallel fashion, each supported by four slender legs. The tops are flat and made of wooden planks, with some sections featuring rope or cord accents at the corners, adding a subtle decorative touch. The wood appears dark and weathered, suggesting durability and outdoor use, while the rope details provide a rustic, handcrafted feel. One section includes a small staircase, indicating a possible use as a modular seating or climbing structure, perhaps for a park or playground. The overall construction is open and airy, with ample space between the legs and platforms. The design is utilitarian yet visually appealing, suitable for communal or recreational urban environments.
description: A set of tall, wooden stools or platforms with rope accents and a small staircase, arranged in a modular, open layout. The design is rustic and functional, ideal for outdoor urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the linear arrangement of stools, with rope accents visible on the nearest platforms and a clear view of the open leg structure.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase leading up to one platform and the parallel alignment of the stools, with rope details on the rightmost units.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tops of the platforms and the uniform spacing between the legs, with rope accents visible on the farthest stools.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the staircase from above, the rope details, and the overall modular structure of the stools.
